title: Damage Sensor
description: Defines what events to call when this entity is damaged by specific entities or items.

deals_damage.title: Deals Damage
deals_damage.description:
Defines how received damage affects the entity.

Values:
• yes: Received damage is applied to the entity.
• no: Received damage is not applied to the entity.
• no_but_side_effects_apply: Received damage is not applied to the entity, but the side effects of the attack are. This means that the attacker's weapon loses durability, enchantment side effects are applied, and so on.

cause.title: Cause
cause.description: Type of damage that triggers the events.

damage_modifier.title: Damage Modifier
damage_modifier.description: A modifier that adds/removes to the base damage received from the specified damage cause.

damage_multiplier.title: Damage Multiplier
damage_multiplier.description: A multiplier that modifies the base damage received from the specified damage cause.

deals_damage.title: Deals Damage
deals_damage.description: Defines how received damage affects the entity.

defaultSnippets.label: Deals Damage: true (enable)
defaultSnippets.description: Defines how received damage affects the entity.

defaultSnippets.label: Deals Damage: false (disable)
defaultSnippets.description: Defines how received damage affects the entity.

on_damage.title: On Damage
on_damage.description: Defines which entities the trigger applies to, and which event to emit when damaged.

on_damage_sound_event.title: Damage Sound Event
on_damage_sound_event.description: Defines what sound to play when the on_damage filters are met.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter conditions for when this trigger applies.

event.title: Event
event.description: Event to emit when the trigger conditions are met.

triggers.title: Triggers
triggers.description:
List of triggers with the events to call when taking specific kinds of damage.

Properties:
• cause (string) = none
• damage_modifier (float) = 0
• damage_multiplier (float) = 1
• deals_damage (boolean) = false
• on_damage
• on_damage_sound_event
• filters
• event (string)

Sample values:
• allay: [{"deals_damage":"no","on_damage":{"filters":{"...
• bat: {"cause":"fall","deals_damage":"no"}
• breeze: [{"cause":"fall","deals_damage":"no"},{"cause":...
